title: selliguea cesatiana
intro: Selliguea cesatiana, also known as the Philippine polypody, is a type of fern native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Selliguea cesatiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
